label: GV.RM-01
definition: Risk management objectives are established and agreed to by organizational stakeholders

label: GV.RM-02
definition: Risk appetite and risk tolerance statements are established, communicated, and maintained

label: GV.RM-03
definition: Cybersecurity risk management activities and outcomes are included in enterprise risk management processes

label: GV.RM-04
definition: Strategic direction that describes appropriate risk response options is established and communicated

label: GV.RM-05
definition: Lines of communication across the organization are established for cybersecurity risks, including risks from suppliers and other third parties

label: GV.RM-06
definition: A standardized method for calculating, documenting, categorizing, and prioritizing cybersecurity risks is established and communicated

label: GV.RM-07
definition: Strategic opportunities (i.e., positive risks) are characterized and are included in organizational cybersecurity risk discussions
